  • Method Details

    • getDefault

      public static IEditorPagesRegistry getDefault()
      Return the unique singleton instance of this class.
      Returns:
      the unique singleton instance of this class.

    • createAllPages

      public EventBEditorPage[] createAllPages(String editorID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Create all editor pages for the given editor ID.
      Specified by:
      createAllPages in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      Returns:
      a list of editor pages for the editor with the given id. Return an empty list if the editor ID is invalid. All the instances of the pages are NOT null.

    • loadRegistry

      private void loadRegistry()
      Utility method for loading registry information.

    • getExtensionPoint

      private org.eclipse.core.runtime.IExtensionPoint getExtensionPoint()

    • sortPages

      private void sortPages()
      Utility method for sorting pages for each editor according to their priority in ascending order.

    • registerPage

      private void registerPage(String targetID, EditorPagesRegistry.PageInfo info)
      Register a page information for a target editor.
      Parameters:
      targetID - the target editor ID.
      info - the page information.

    • isValid

      public boolean isValid(String editorID, String pageID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Check if the page id is a valid page for an editor with the given editor id.
      Specified by:
      isValid in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      pageID - a page id
      Returns:
      true if the page id is valid page for editor with given input editor id. Return false otherwise, including if the editor id is invalid.

    • createPage

      public EventBEditorPage createPage(String editorID, String pageID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Create an editor page corresponding to the given page id and editor id.
      Specified by:
      createPage in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      pageID - a page id.
      Returns:
      an editor page corresponding to the input page id for the given editor. Return null if the editor ID is invalid or the page ID is invalid or there is some problem in creating the page.

    • getPageName

      public String getPageName(String editorID, String pageID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Get the name of the editor page corresponding to the given page id and editor id.
      Specified by:
      getPageName in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      pageID - a page id
      Returns:
      the name of the corresponding page to the input page id and the editor id. Return null if the page id or the editor id is invalid. If the page does not have a name, its id will be returned.

    • getAllPageIDs

      public List<String> getAllPageIDs(String editorID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Return the list of all page IDs registered for the given editor.
      Specified by:
      getAllPageIDs in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      Returns:
      the list of page IDs for given editor. Return an empty list if the editor ID is invalid.

    • getDefaultPageIDs

      public List<String> getDefaultPageIDs(String editorID)
      Description copied from interface: IEditorPagesRegistry
      Return the list of default page IDs for given editor.
      Specified by:
      getDefaultPageIDs in interface IEditorPagesRegistry
      Parameters:
      editorID - an editor ID, it must be either {EventBMachineEditor.#EDITOR_ID} or {EventBContextEditor.#EDITOR_ID}.
      Returns:
      the list of default page IDs for given editor. Return an empty list if the editor ID is invalid.

    • setAlternateExtensionPointID

      public void setAlternateExtensionPointID(String extensionPointId)
      Change the id of the extension point to use. This method is reserved for testing purpose only.
      Parameters:
      extensionPointId - the id of the extension point to use or null to revert to the regular one
